results.Description: THIS IS A LOW PROFILE WATCH WITH A ROBUST DISPLAY THAT IS SCRATCH RESISTANT, TOPOGRAPHIC MAPS, WAYPOINT NAVIGATION, TACTICAL MODE FOR SETTING PACE AND SPEED, MILITARY GRID REFERENCE SYSTEM, NIGHT VISION COMPATIBILITY AND DIVE/JUMP MASTER READY. THESE WATCHES PROVE TO BE INVALUABLE ASSETS FOR A PLATOON AND THEIR MISSIONS.

results.Description: WHILE CONDUCTING ROUTINE BOAT TRAINING OPERATIONS, BOAT NAVIGATOR DISCOVERED THE FURNO MULTIFUNCTION DISPLAY WAS NON OPERATIONAL UPON FURTHER TROUBLESHOOTING BOAT ENGINEER DISCOVERED THIS ISSUE WAS CAUSED BY FAULTY ELECTRICAL WIRING. AS PER NECC INSTRUCTION THIS MALFUNCTION IS CONSIDERED A SAFETY HAZARD DUE TO EVERY CRAFT SHALL HAVE AN APPROVED PRIMARY MEANS OF POSITION.
